agentdb-watch._comment: Daily check: has AgentDB integration shipped?

autonomous-runner._comment: t-2140 Stage 3 autonomous runner. DEFAULT-DENY: disabled + --observe (reports would-run/would-park/excluded, ZERO writes). To enable autonomy: set enabled=true and change --observe to --run-batch. Bounds: RUNNER_MAX_TASKS cap, consecutive-failure kill at RUNNER_MAX_FAILS=3 (ADR-050), kill-switch file ~/.claude/scheduler/runner.stop. Only tasks with execution=autonomous (not P0, unblocked) are ever touched; PR-per-task, human merges.

backup-memory._comment: Daily rotating backup of ruflo memory.db (runs before sync-state push at 08:00)

cc-changelog-review._comment: Weekly CC changelog diff — writes ~/.claude/cc-changelog-report.md if changes found (t-512)

close-extraction._comment: ADR-052 Track 2: nightly extraction — agy pass per queued close snapshot, learnings to reminders, daily summary. Exits non-zero on agy failure so health surfaces it.

content-harvest._comment: t-680: weekly content harvest. Moved to ventures/linkedin 2026-04-06 after harvest skill relocation.

daily-digest._comment: t-688: daily Telegram digest summarizing all scheduler runs. Enable on Oracle only (requires ~/.hub-secrets).

export-patterns._comment: ADR-015: weekly backup of ruflo patterns and decisions to git

feed-index._comment: t-1009: daily intelligence digest from feed-log.jsonl → ~/.claude/intelligence-feed-digest.md. Runs after last feed-poll (18:00).

feed-poll._comment: t-1009: poll all registered RSS/Atom feeds 3x daily. Appends new entries to feed-log.jsonl.

feed-ruflo-index._comment: t-1138: store new feed entries to ruflo memory_entries for semantic search. Runs 15min after feed-index (19:00). Entries searchable after next session start.

feed-summarize._comment: t-1139: fetch anthropic-news article URLs, summarize via claude -p -> feed-summaries.jsonl (feed-index joins at 19:00). Was missing from template (t-2076).

inbox-poll._comment: t-585: poll Gmail for new newsletter emails.

index-assumptions._comment: ADR-021: weekly index of assumptions, field notes, and ADR decisions into ruflo

kapso-changelog-check._comment: t-2011: Kapso changelog scraper (no RSS exists) - docs.kapso.ai/changelog.md -> feed-log.jsonl, before feed-index (19:00). ADR-055.

knowledge-decay._comment: t-936/t-1102: weekly DECAY — stale dimensions, event log bloat, ruflo noise. Runs after reindex-knowledge (noon).

knowledge-pipeline-tier1._comment: t-1136: nightly Tier 1+2 LinkedIn URL relevance filter + cluster assignment. Enable manually after dry-run passes clean. Tier 3 is manual only.
knowledge-pipeline-tier1.command: brana knowledge process --tier1 && brana knowledge process --tier2

link-check._comment: Weekly dead link check (enable after lychee is installed)

link-research-extraction._comment: t-2306: capped /brana:research pass over pending link-tagged tasks from telegram link-capture — closes the capture-to-knowledge loop

lint-heal._comment: t-1075: weekly L2 memory lint+heal — dedup, contradiction detection, frontmatter imputation. Runs after knowledge-decay (13:00). Enable only after --dry-run validation.

memory-consolidation._comment: t-1834: threshold-triggered L3 consolidation — debrief-flag consumption + frontmatter date normalization. OR trigger: >24h OR >=5 sessions. Does NOT call lint-heal.sh (no lock collision). Runs Mon-Sat only (Sun handled by lint-heal at 15:00 which resets session counter).

morning-check._comment: Daily morning focus card — disabled locally (runs on Oracle for Telegram). Enable only on venture projects.

personal-repo-pull._comment: t-2306: laptop sees new tasks/event-log entries from oracle-hub's link-capture cron without manual git pull

reindex-knowledge._comment: Weekly full reindex of brana-knowledge dimension docs into ruflo memory. Runs at noon (moved from 2am: cold-boot MCP unavailable, t-1101).

reindex-patterns._comment: t-857: weekly FTS reindex → ~/.claude/memory/index.db. noProjectLock (t-2292): writes only its own store, opts out of the shared project lock so a Sun-wake catch-up burst can't starve it into a SKIP.

reminder-dispatch._comment: t-1999/ADR-054: dispatch due reminders to registered channels (notify-channels.json) every 30 min. noProjectLock: writes only the Rust-locked reminder store (ADR-051), never tasks.json — must not be starved by the wake catch-up burst (t-2292). Empty-store runs exit fast and silent.

second-phase-review._comment: ADR-021: weekly check for time-gated second-phase tasks

stale-branches-reap._comment: t-2148: weekly reaper of MERGED local branches (safe -d only; never deletes unmerged). DEFAULT-DENY disabled; enable when desired.

staleness-report._comment: Weekly staleness check on spec docs

statusline-slow-cache._comment: t-1023: write ruflo health, portfolio pulse, knowledge freshness to statusline slow-cache every 5min

sync-state._comment: ADR-015: daily safety net — sync operational state from cache to repos.
